channel.title: Paddle Lines
channel.description: Fresh takes for recreational kayakers and paddlers.

item.title: Ask the forge: your storage questions, answered
item.description: Straight answers to the storage questions recreational kayakers and paddlers keep asking, minus the hedging.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in trips with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest trips adjustments that recreational kayakers and paddlers report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: kayak safety basics
item.description: The persistent myths around kayak safety basics, stress-tested against what recreational kayakers and paddlers actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your boats in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying boats project for recreational kayakers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/canoeing is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the storage community this week.

item.title: The trips checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified trips purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of safety
item.description: The most common early stumbles in safety, and the cheap corrections that fix them for recreational kayakers and paddlers.

item.title: "best day paddle trips" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about best day paddle trips through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: The state of Boats in 2026
item.description: A field report on boats: where things stand, and what recreational kayakers and paddlers should do next.
